name: apexyard/safety-hooks
description: Production-grade safety hooks for Claude Code — secrets scanning, main-push block, git-add-all block, pre-push gate, commit-ref verification, PR-title + branch-name validation. Tracker-agnostic (gh / linear / jira / asana / custom). One tooth of the ApexYard governance comb; extracted from upstream on every framework release.

hooks.name: check-secrets
hooks.purpose: Block staged secrets in git commits

hooks.name: pre-push-gate
hooks.purpose: Remind to run lint/test/build before pushing

hooks.name: verify-commit-refs
hooks.purpose: Verify Closes/Refs/Fixes #N references real tracker issues

hooks.name: validate-pr-create
hooks.purpose: Validate PR title format + ticket ID existence

graduation_path.name: apexyard (full framework)
graduation_path.what_you_get: Two-marker merge gate (Rex + CEO), migration gate, active-ticket gate, leak protection, AgDR memory, 19 role definitions, portfolio registry
